name: Pretaloka - The Hungry Ghost Realm
description: The realm of insatiable craving, divided into fetid swamps crawling with the newly dead, ancient graveyards haunted by desiccated skeletons, and the charnel grounds where vetalas hold court in palaces that are not quite real.

location_names._comment: Tibetan/Sanskrit compound names for hungry ghost realm settlements. Preta=hungry ghost, Ro=corpse, Drib=obscuration, Tshog=gathering/craving, Nyom=desire, Ku=body, Sem=mind. Sanskrit: ksudha=hunger, trishna=craving, shava=corpse, shmashana=charnel. Suffixes: khar=fort, thang=plain, yul=land, lung=valley, dzong=citadel, pura=city.

zones._comment: Left third of the map, full height. Start zone.
Vertical wall separating swamp from the right half. Pass biased to lower area so the player must travel south before crossing.
Top-right section. Final zone — reached by going UP through the horizontal wall from the graveyard.
Horizontal wall within the right section. Pass biased to the right so the player must explore the graveyard before finding it.
Bottom-right section. First zone entered after the vertical wall pass.

fixed_landmarks._comment: Start at top-left of swamp. Player must travel south to find the vertical wall pass.
Portal placed first so boss placement can use it as an anchor.

data.description: A shimmering portal to the Animal Realm.

fixed_landmarks._comment: Boss guards the portal in the top-right of charnel grounds, farthest from entry point.
Guards the vertical wall pass (swamp → graveyard crossing).
Guards the horizontal wall pass (graveyard → charnel grounds crossing).

events.name: The Court of the Musician Prince

pickups.name: Sunken Chest
pickups.message: Half-submerged in the muck. Most of the gold survived.

pickups.name: Waterlogged Pack
pickups.message: Someone dropped this in a hurry. Some things are still usable.

pickups.name: Murky Pool
pickups.message: The water tastes wrong, but your mana draws from stranger sources.

pickups.name: Preta Offering
pickups.message: Food left for a hungry ghost. None of it can be eaten.

pickups.name: Warm Mud Vent
pickups.message: Noxious but strangely restorative.

pickups.name: Preta's Tear
pickups.message: A single tear, crystallized. You feel it cleanse something.

pickups.name: Will-o-Wisp Residue
pickups.message: A faint glow left behind. Your awareness sharpens.

pickups.name: Swamp Shrine
pickups.message: Sunk to the knees in mud, offerings still fresh.

pickups.name: Bog Iron Deposits
pickups.message: Strange metal drawn up from the swamp floor.

pickups.name: Trapped Spirit Light
pickups.message: A spirit bound inside a floating sphere. It gives off warmth.

pickups.name: Sunken Altar
pickups.message: You have to kneel in the water to reach it.

pickups.name: Waterlogged Tome
pickups.message: Miraculously legible. You learn something you hadn't known.

pickups.name: Ghost Charm
pickups.message: Humming with bound hunger. Somehow useful.

pickups.name: Magic Well
pickups.message: Shimmering with power.

pickups.name: Sunken Bone Pile
pickups.message: Something metallic glints in the murk.

pickups.name: Wayside Shrine
pickups.message: If you want a good omen, you have to make it yourself.

pickups.name: Fetid Mist Patch
pickups.message: The mist clings to you. You feel slower, heavier.

pickups.name: Rotting Offering
pickups.message: Someone left food for the dead. It looks almost edible. It isn't.

events.name: The Court of the Musician Prince

pickups.name: Grave Offering
pickups.message: Gold and valuables left for the dead. They won't miss it.

pickups.name: Scattered Grave Goods
pickups.message: A tomb disturbed long before you arrived.

pickups.name: Dust Spring
pickups.message: A trickle of water seeping up through cracked earth.

pickups.name: Ancient Inscription
pickups.message: Carved in a script older than this realm. You understand it anyway.

pickups.name: Memorial Cairn
pickups.message: Stones piled by the living, far from here.

pickups.name: Ancestral Charm
pickups.message: A charm from several lifetimes ago. It still works.

pickups.name: Crumbled Relic
pickups.message: Holy once. Still faintly warm.

pickups.name: Bone Dust
pickups.message: Powdered remains. A necromancer would know what to do with this.

pickups.name: Funerary Urn
pickups.message: Sealed and intact. Valuable, if you don't ask what's inside.

pickups.name: Sunken Soul Well
pickups.message: You can feel the outlines of strange memories.

pickups.name: Wayside Shrine
pickups.message: If you want a good omen, you have to make it yourself.

pickups.name: Ghost Charm
pickups.message: Humming with bound hunger. Somehow useful.

pickups.name: Magic Well
pickups.message: Shimmering with power.

pickups.name: Dry Bone Pile
pickups.message: Ancient bones, perfectly dry. Something metallic is lodged among them.

pickups.name: Twisted Idol
pickups.message: You feel sick looking into its eyes.

pickups.name: Bone Dust Patch
pickups.message: The dust gets into everything. You cough for an hour.

pickups.name: Empty Crypt
pickups.message: You spend time forcing it open. Nothing inside but old air.

events.name: The Court of the Musician Prince

pickups.name: Scattered Offerings
pickups.message: Gold and herbs from a discarded feast. The food you leave behind.

pickups.name: Charnel Incense
pickups.message: Burns with a smell that sharpens the mind uncomfortably.

pickups.name: Strange Fire
pickups.message: It burns without fuel, in colors fire shouldn't be.

pickups.name: Spirit Fountain
pickups.message: It fills you, though you cannot say with what.

pickups.name: Palace Mirage
pickups.message: You reach out for the door. Your hand passes through. But the feeling lingers.

pickups.name: Vetala's Gift
pickups.message: A charm left on a post. Generous, or a trap.

pickups.name: Charnel Ground Shrine
pickups.message: A dakini shrine. Someone maintains it carefully.

pickups.name: Ash Cache
pickups.message: Hidden beneath the ash. Whoever left this didn't come back.

pickups.name: Bone Throne Debris
pickups.message: A fallen seat of power, stripped of its gems.

pickups.name: Ghost Charm
pickups.message: Humming with bound hunger. Somehow useful.

pickups.name: Magic Well
pickups.message: Shimmering with power.

pickups.name: Wayside Shrine
pickups.message: If you want a good omen, you have to make it yourself.

pickups.name: Experience Stone
pickups.message: When you touch it, your mind becomes strangely sparkly.

pickups.name: Twisted Idol
pickups.message: You feel sick looking into its eyes.

pickups.name: Illusory Gold
pickups.message: It looks like a fortune. When you reach for it, it burns.

pickups.name: Craving Incense
pickups.message: The smell is wonderful. You feel hollow afterward.
